content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be dynamically pruned and prioritized by the intrinsic reward signals from curiosity-driven reinforcement learning (ICM/RND), where unexpected, under-explored memory traces get amplified for future planning while over-learned, predictable traces are deprioritized to avoid memory bloat. This creates a self-organizing memory that grows with the agent’s information gain rather than linearly scaling with interaction time.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
